name.es: Pan de masa madre de espelta

description.en: Freshly milled spelt folded through a high-extraction wheat dough for a loaf that's noticeably sweeter and nuttier than a plain wheat sourdough, with a softer bite. Spelt's extensible, fragile gluten calls for a gentler hand, but the payoff is real character.
description.de: Frisch gemahlener Dinkel, eingearbeitet in einen hochausgemahlenen Weizenteig – ein Brot, spürbar süßer und nussiger als reines Weizensauerteigbrot, mit weicherem Biss. Dinkels dehnbares, empfindliches Gluten verlangt eine sanftere Hand, belohnt aber mit echtem Charakter.
description.es: Espelta recién molida incorporada a una masa de trigo de alta extracción, para un pan más dulce y con más sabor a frutos secos que uno de trigo puro, con miga más suave. El gluten frágil de la espelta pide mano suave, pero el resultado tiene carácter propio.
description.fr: De l'épeautre fraîchement moulu incorporé à une pâte de blé à haute extraction, pour un pain nettement plus doux et noisetté qu'un levain de blé pur, à la mie plus tendre. Le gluten extensible et fragile de l'épeautre demande plus de douceur, mais le résultat a un vrai caractère.

origin.note: Spelt has deep Central European roots, but this long-fermented, high-hydration treatment is a contemporary artisan-bakery formula.

method.title: Build the levain
method.summary: Mix starter with bread flour, high-extraction flour and water; ripen 5-6 hours at warm room temperature.

method.title: Autolyse
method.summary: Combine the remaining flours, including the freshly milled spelt, with water; rest 30 minutes with the levain already mixed in.

method.title: Mix
method.summary: Slap-and-fold briefly to bring the dough together, about 5 minutes.

method.title: Bulk ferment
method.summary: Ferment about 4.5 hours, giving four stretch-and-fold sets in the first hour; go easy since spelt slackens more than wheat as fermentation progresses.

method.title: Shape
method.summary: Divide, preshape, rest 20 minutes, then shape and bench-rest another 25 minutes.

method.title: Bake
method.summary: Bake in a preheated Dutch oven at 230°C: 20 minutes covered with steam, then 30-35 minutes uncovered for a dark crust.

method.title: Cool
method.summary: Rest fully on a wire rack before slicing.

source.author: Maurizio Leo
source.adaptation: High-extraction flour modeled as a 60/40 white/whole-wheat blend for the formula breakdown; only the levain fraction actually used in the dough is counted, prorated from the full build.
